## Objective

Describe the main goal of this PR in one or two sentences.

## Change type

- [ ] `feat` (new feature)
- [ ] `fix` (bug fix)
- [ ] `refactor` (internal restructuring)
- [ ] `style` (visual/CSS only)
- [ ] `docs` (documentation)
- [ ] `ci` (workflow/deploy)

## Scope summary

- What changed:
- Why this change:

## Commit quality checklist

- [ ] Commits are grouped by functionality.
- [ ] No unrelated changes mixed in one commit.
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and objective.

## Validation

- [ ] Project builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Main user flow tested manually
